title: EMEKIAN 30mm Natural Thick Jute Rope, 15M Twisted 4 Strand Fiber Hemp Rope, Strong Jute Twine String for Gardening, Craft, Bundling, Camping, Decorating (Brown)
features: 💯【Natural Material】Our thick jute rope is made of biodegradable plant fiber. For this pure natural rope, we recommend wrapping a short section with thick tape, then cutting the rope to the right size with sharp scissors, 100% eco-friendly.

💯【Sturdy And Durable】 The 4-strand stranded hemp rope we use is the strongest among all natural fiber ropes, soft and durable, with high breaking strength. The 4-strand rope also provides excellent shock absorption without kinking. Great savings on large commercial, construction or home improvement projects.

💯【All-Weather Use】Our jute ropes have excellent knot retention ability under extreme conditions, resistance to extreme weather, chemicals, rot, alkali, gasoline, and humidity. It is the right choice for all indoor and outdoor applications.

💯【Multi-Site Applications】 Our natural jute ropes have a variety of uses, which are very suitable for sailing and marine purposes, pastures or farms, tug-of-war competitions, decorations for landscapes and other indoor and outdoor places. It is also suitable for home decoration, handicrafts, gardening, Hammock, scratching post, binding, wooden tree swing, fence decoration, retro, camping, wedding, clothesline, games and other items.

💯【Perfect Size】 We have a variety of sizes and length combinations to meet your rope needs. The thickness of the rope is 20mm (3/4 inch), 25mm (1 inch), 30mm (1 1/5 inch), and the rope length is 15m (49feet) and 30m(98feet).
description: Product Description Multiple Specifications: 30mm x 15m 30mm x 30m 25mm x 15m 25mm x 30m 20mm x 15m 20mm x 30m Requires Attention To prevent the rope from falling apart, wrap the end with tape or cut it and tie it up. About EMEKIAN Rope Sturdy and Safe EMEKIAN Jute Rope is made of high-quality plant fiber material, which is strong and durable. And it has various uses and complete specifications, which will bring you a better experience. 4 Strands Twisted Jute Rope The 4-strand stranded jute rope we use is the strongest among all natural fiber ropes, soft and durable, with high breaking strength. All-Weather Use EMEKIAN ropes have excellent knot retention ability under extreme conditions, resistance to extreme weather, chemicals, rot, alkali, gasoline, and humidity.remain strong in rain, wind, sun, and snow, It is the right choice for all indoor and outdoor applications. Come Soon Use EMEKIAN Rope Take An Exciting Tug of War Race !!! EMEKIAN jute ropes have a variety of uses, it has high quality of abrasion resistant. Very suitable for heavy projects such as handicrafts, construction, rock climbing, sports, etc. Very suitable for landscaping, gardening, etc. Very suitable for family, party, wedding decoration, etc. Very suitable for nautical and marine uses, pastures and farms, etc. They will be the perfect items for your home application.
